fieldValues.value: RFC-017 Change B: Optional `com.semanticops.base` package with `attachment_policy` type

Define an optional package namespace `com.semanticops.base` that a repository MAY install. Its sole initial content is a `repo_settings` type with an optional `attachment_policy` record. The `attachment_policy` shape carries four optional fields: `allowedMimeTypes` (Text/JSON array), `maxPerFileBytes` (Number), `maxDocBytes` (Number), `maxTotalBytes` (Number). At most one `attachment_policy` record may exist per repository. Stable UUIDs for the four fields and the type MUST be assigned when the `com.semanticops.base` package records are created in the `srs/srs` repository; implementations MUST NOT mint independent UUID assignments.

Making attachment policy part of the core package would couple the core model to the application layer and force all repositories — including those that never use attachments — to carry a settings record. An optional package keeps the core model minimal and ensures SRS continues to work with no configuration layer.
